typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-white leading-[1.1]
typography.h2: text-lg sm:text-xl font-medium tracking-tight text-slate-200 max-w-2xl

layout.nav: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white border-b border-slate-200 py-4 w-full
layout.hero: relative bg-[#0b3d91] overflow-hidden flex flex-col-reverse lg:flex-row items-center

buttons.primary: bg-[#ff6b00] hover:bg-[#e66000] text-white rounded-md px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 ai-chat-trigger shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,107,0,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,107,0,0.6)] animate-[pulse_2s_cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.6,1)_infinite]
buttons.rules: MUST include 'ai-chat-trigger' class. MUST be highly visible orange. Use for lead generation.

components.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow duration-300 flex flex-col group
components.modal: Use Shadcn Dialog for the lead form. Form fields: Name (Input), Phone (Input), Issue (Textarea), Submit (Button). Follow Shadcn structure.

hero_plumber.alt: Professional smiling plumber in uniform standing confidently
hero_plumber.placement: Hero section right side on desktop, stacked top on mobile.

service_leaks.alt: Burst pipe leaking water requiring emergency repair
service_leaks.placement: Core Services: Emergency Leaks & Bursts card image

service_water_heater.alt: Plumber repairing water heater with tools
service_water_heater.placement: Core Services: Water Heater Repair & Install card image

service_drain.alt: Plumber fixing kitchen sink and drainage pipe
service_drain.placement: Core Services: Drain Cleaning & Unclogging card image

specific_instructions_to_agent: Ensure bottom-right corner is strictly clear of any fixed elements (like scroll-to-top buttons) to leave room for a chat widget.
Add the class 'ai-chat-trigger' to ALL orange CTAs as requested by user.
Nav Bar Phone CTA MUST be red text to stand out as an emergency number (e.g., text-red-600 font-bold).
Trust Banner should be a horizontal row of three signals on desktop, stacking on mobile. Use Lucide icons (ShieldCheck, Star, Award) beside the text.
Hero CTA button must have a pulsing animation to indicate urgency (Tailwind animate-pulse is fine, or custom ping).
Do NOT add any complex 3D animations or heavy background videos. Keep the DOM light and extremely fast for mobile.
Implement a Shadcn Dialog containing a lead capture form (Name, Phone, Issue) when user clicks 'Get an Instant Estimate'. Save action can just simulate a backend save or log to console for now.
Every interactive element MUST have a data-testid attribute.
Use optical alignment and generous spacing. Do not clutter elements.
